scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.verify: npm run preflight && npm run smoke:services
scripts.dev: npm run preflight && concurrently "npm run server" "npm run wait-server && npm run client" "npm run voice-ai"
scripts.server: npx kill-port 5000 && npm run dev --prefix server
scripts.up: npm run install-all && npm run preflight && npm run full-dev
scripts.up:docker: npm run infra:up && npm run full-dev
scripts.health:all: npm run wait-server && npm run wait-face-ai && npm run wait-voice-ai && npm run wait-client
scripts.start-all: npm pkg exec concurrently "npm run full-dev" "cmd /c start cmd /k cd stable-diffusion-webui \\& webui-user.bat" "docker compose up mongodb -d"
scripts.start-all:unix: concurrently "npm run full-dev" "cd stable-diffusion-webui && ./webui.sh" "docker compose up mongodb -d"
